title: 48 McCarthy Tétrault Lawyers Recognized for Energy Expertise in Lexpert Special Edition
content:
## 48 McCarthy Tétrault Lawyers Recognized for Energy Expertise in Lexpert Special Edition
Lexpert has named 48 McCarthy Tétrault practitioners as “leading lawyers” in its Special Edition: Energy 2023 , recognizing the firm’s vast industry expertise and experience helping clients navigate their most complex energy matters. This year’s rankings recognize our firm’s exceptional client advice in electricity, oil and gas, environmental law, aboriginal law, banking, construction law, corporate commercial law, corporate finance and securities, corporate mid-market, infrastructure law, corporate commercial litigation, commercial insurance litigation, and project finance.
The following McCarthy Tétrault were recognized as leading lawyers:
- Thoburn (Toby) B. Allan
- Dominique Amyot-Bilodeau
- Audrey Bouffard-Nesbitt
- Louis-Nicolas Boulanger
- Abraham (Bram) Costin
- Christopher W. Langdon
- Jennifer F. Longhurst
Access the Lexpert Special Edition: Energy 2023 publication.
McCarthy Tétrault is dedicated to helping clients achieve success on their most important and complex legal matters. Lexpert ’s consistent recognition of our team in key industries reinforces our reputation as innovators and multidisciplinary leaders across Canada and internationally.
From supporting the development, construction and financing of exciting and transformational projects to helping our clients manage their projects’ social and environmental impacts, we have the expertise and foresight to mitigate risks and add value. Through our experience supporting developers, equity investors, lenders, major industrial and commercial users, operators, governments and government agencies, we offer comprehensive insights into policies, key players, and stakeholders to successfully move energy and infrastructure projects through their life cycles. Learn more about our Energy expertise.
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
